archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) adapted for Premium Sports App with Blue/Purple Gradients

button.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-purple-600 text-white rounded-xl shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all
button.secondary: bg-white text-indigo-600 border border-indigo-100 rounded-xl hover:bg-slate-50 transition-colors
button.floating_action: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-tr from-indigo-600 to-purple-600 shadow-xl flex items-center justify-center text-white transform -translate-y-6 border-4 border-slate-50

bottom_tab_nav.layout: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md mx-auto flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-safe z-50

layout_patterns.spacing: Generous padding, typically p-4 or p-6 for containers. gap-4 for grid items.
layout_patterns.header: sticky top-0 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md pt-4 pb-4 px-5 flex justify-between items-center z-40 border-b border-slate-100/50
layout_patterns.screen_container: min-h-screen bg-slate-50 pb-28 mx-auto w-full max-w-md shadow-2xl relative overflow-hidden

1_Splash.layout: Full screen flex-col center, premium gradient overlay
1_Splash.elements: Academy Logo, background image with gradient overlay (from-indigo-900/80 to-purple-900/80), 'Premium Sports Academy' text.

2_Login.elements: Welcome text, ID/Phone input, Password input, 'Forgot Password' link, 'Login' primary button, 'Parent Login' secondary outline button.

3_Home_Dashboard.layout: Scrollable vertical list with bento grid for quick cards
3_Home_Dashboard.elements: Top: Profile photo + Hello [Name] + Notification bell. Next: Membership Badge / Level Card with gradient. Next: 2xN Grid of quick cards (Attendance, Today's Classes, Timetable, Fees Due, Progress, Chat). Next: Event Banner carousel.

4_My_Training.elements: Cards showing Sport (Karate/Boxing), Trainer name, Current Level/Belt, Progress bar to next level, 'Upgrade' CTA.

5_Schedule.elements: Weekly calendar strip, List of upcoming sessions for selected date, 'Reschedule request' subtle button.

6_Attendance.elements: Large Circular Progress for %, Monthly Calendar view with green/red dots, List of missed classes.

7_Fees_Payments.elements: Highlight Card: 'Next Payment Due' with amount & 'Pay Now' button. Below: List of past transactions with 'Download Receipt' icon.

8_Progress.elements: Skill Stats (Speed, Power, Technique), Rank timeline, Fitness score card, Trainer comments section.

9_Events_Competition.elements: Upcoming tournaments with countdown timers, Registration open badge, 'Register Now' button, Past certificates.

10_Profile.elements: Large Avatar, Student Details, Parent Contact, Training History, 'Settings' list items (Notifications, Privacy, Logout).

splash_background.description: Karate training background, apply blue/purple gradient overlay.

boxing_category.description: Black boxing gloves for boxing training category card.

trophy_event.description: Trophy for events, competitions, and progress achievements.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React-based mobile web app (simulating React Native Expo) using Tailwind CSS and lucide-react icons.
Implement the bottom tab navigation with fixed positioning at the bottom and a floating QR button overlapping the top border (center positioned).
Use standard HTML divs/buttons for layout and styling (bento grids, cards) to maintain the exact premium styling described in the components section.
Ensure the layout is highly spacious on mobile. To simulate a mobile app on desktop, wrap the main app content in a 'max-w-md mx-auto shadow-2xl overflow-hidden min-h-screen relative' container.
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Apply `bg-slate-50` to the main application body and `bg-white` to the content cards.
Gradients should be vibrant yet premium: `bg-gradient-to-r from-indigo-600 to-purple-600` for primary call-to-actions, membership cards, and the floating action button.
Do NOT use transparent headers. Use the glassmorphism header defined in layout_patterns.header.
Create 10 distinct views matching the screens object, accessible via the bottom tab nav or internal links.
